title: Stavanger Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Stavanger, with a Z-Score of -3.51. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Stavanger are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The cold snap has resulted in a high number of heating degree days (HDD) at 13.3 GG, while cooling degree days (CDD) remain at 0.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 70%, with moderate winds of 9.4 km/h, exacerbating the cold conditions.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
